revision.comment: Created page with "#redirect[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]"
creating the 4th subcategory, yes therw will be overlaps but this will work well
Adding [[Category:ddd]] mass dummy category adding in order to refresh the categories using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bbb]] adding a dummy category again to make the cateroies show up using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
I think that lowercase does not work with hotcat
Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:4th redirect category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Wikilink]][[Category:4th redirect Category]][[Category:4th redirect category]] [[Category:ddd]] [[Category:bbb]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Help:Wikilink]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

#redirect[[en:Help:Wikilink]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]] on (CatAlot)

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]
removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25441284107|time triggered pipeline]]
